# onmedic

onmedic is a health-tech studio operated by ArnoHealth S.L. (Barcelona, EU), in eHealth since 2000. It builds eHealth systems for hospitals, research centers, pharmaceutical labs and medical centers — discreetly, without naming clients — and ships its own line of privacy-first medical and sports apps.

Through-line: privacy-first / on-device by design.

## Key pages

- Home: https://onmedic.com/
- What we build (services): https://onmedic.com/#institutions
- Products we ship: https://onmedic.com/products/
- About the studio (ArnoHealth S.L., founder Albert Arnó): https://onmedic.com/about/
- Contact: https://onmedic.com/contact/
- Mobile App Legal Policies (Generic Terms & Privacy): https://onmedic.com/terms-privacy-generics/
  - Local Apps Terms of Use: https://onmedic.com/apps/local-terms/
  - Local Apps Privacy Policy: https://onmedic.com/apps/local-privacy/
  - Online Apps Terms of Use: https://onmedic.com/apps/online-terms/
  - Online Apps Privacy Policy: https://onmedic.com/apps/online-privacy/

## Product line (ships its own products)

- Sports analytics — AnalyticsZone (Swim, Run, Bike, Hike, Walk, SwimTrainer): https://analyticszone.app
- Medical apps: Pelvisana (https://www.pelvisana.com), CardioAnalytics, Health Analytics, Sleep Analytics

## Entity

- Legal entity: ArnoHealth S.L., Barcelona, Spain (EU)
- Founder: Albert Arnó
- In eHealth since 2000
